lifecycle.duplicate_start: Return already-running only when state, PID identity, command fingerprint, and localhost health all agree.
lifecycle.unknown_port_owner: Refuse to start or stop and show a clear conflict report.
lifecycle.stale_state: Preserve the stale state and logs, mark them stale, and require exact PID/creation-time validation before replacement.

browser.direct_user_start_default: Open the default browser only after verified health.
browser.webui_start_default: Do not auto-open; keep the existing separate Open action.

custom_nodes.reason: C3H verified only the no-custom-node path.
custom_nodes.enablement: Requires a separate read-only inventory, compatibility audit, and operator-approved allowlist gate.

stop_control.normal: A controller-owned supervisor requests graceful child shutdown and waits up to 15 seconds.

logs.on_threshold: Warn and prepare a preview-only prune manifest; do not delete automatically.
